section_ErTJkM.name: You already made a better choice than 99% of people.

settings.text: HydroTumbler Portable Hydrogen Bottle
Model: HS-32 · Capacity: 32 oz · Hydrogen Output: Up to 3.0 ppm · USB-C Rechargeable
What’s in the box

• 1 × HydroStanley Bottle
  • 1 × USB-C Charging Cable
  • 1 × Sling Strap
  • 1 × Quick Start Guide
  • 1 × Warranty and Registration Card
Before you start - a few questions you may have

settings.heading: What kind of water should I use?

settings.text: Use clean water: tap, filtered, or RO, based on your local water quality.

settings.heading: Can I use cold water?

settings.text: Yes, chilled or room-temperature water is fine. Avoid hot water above 40°C (104°F).

settings.heading: Is HydroStanley safe for daily use?

settings.text: Yes. It is made from premium BPA-free Tritan, which is FDA-approved, impact-resistant, and safe for long-term hydration. Most users drink 1 to 3 full bottles spread throughout the day, just like regular water. Start slow and listen to your body.

settings.heading: What is the best time to drink hydrogen water?

settings.text: Any time works: morning energy, post-workout recovery, or throughout the day. Drink within 30 minutes to 2 hours after generation for best results.

settings.heading: Can I refrigerate my bottle before or after hydrogenation?

settings.text: You can, but hydrogen gas naturally fades over time. For the best results, drink within 30 minutes to 2 hours after each cycle. If you like your water cold, hydrogenate first, then add ice. Cooling after generation helps keep the hydrogen intact and the taste refreshing.

section_j3yE9p.name: Before you start - a few questions you may have

settings.text: Setup and first use (activation)
This one-time activation prepares your bottle for long-term performance.
Step 1 - Open the base
Hold the bottle firmly and twist the bottom base clockwise to open. Inside, you will see a white plug and a small amount of clear liquid. This is normal.
Step 2 - Remove the shipping plug and liquid
Gently pull out the white plug and pour out the liquid from the base. Discard it. It is safe, but not meant for drinking. The liquid keeps the internal hydrogen membrane hydrated during shipping.
Step 3 - Reattach the base
Twist the base back on snugly to seal the bottle.
Step 4 - Fill with clean water
Fill the bottle all the way to the top with fresh, non-carbonated water.
Step 5 - Run the activation cycle (one-time only)
Press and hold the power button until the green light appears. Leave the bottle for about 2 hours while it runs its activation process. This fully hydrates and primes the internal membrane.
Step 6 - Empty the activation water
After 2 hours, pour out all the water. Your HydroStanley is now ready to start making hydrogen water.

section_h8CWLY.name: You already made a better choice than 99% of people.

settings.text: Daily use - making hydrogen water

1. Fill your bottle to the top with fresh, clean water.
  2. Close the lid tightly and push the straw down to seal the bottle.
  3. Press the power button once. You will see small bubbles forming. That is hydrogen being generated.
  4. Wait about 10 minutes until the light goes off and you hear a short beep.
  5. Enjoy your hydrogen-rich water. For best results, drink within 30 to 120 minutes.
Charging

• Connect the included USB-C cable to a 5V 1A adapter (do not use fast chargers).
  • Red light means charging, green light means fully charged.
  • A full charge takes about 2 to 3 hours.
  • One full charge typically lasts for 7 to 10 hydrogen cycles.
  • If the bottle stops mid-cycle, recharge it and rerun the hydrogenation.
  • A red light with constant blinking indicates low battery.
Care and maintenance

• Self-clean cycle: Every 20 uses, press and hold the power button for about 3 seconds until the green light flashes to run a self-clean cycle.
  • Deep clean: Once a month, fill the bottle with a 1:3 mix of white vinegar and water, run one cycle, then rinse thoroughly with clean water.
  • Dishwasher: The lid and bottle are dishwasher safe. The base is electronic and should never be submerged. Wipe it with a soft, damp cloth only.
  • Long-term storage: If storing for more than 2 weeks, moisten the white plug and reinsert it into the base to protect the membrane. Run a self-clean cycle before your next use.
Safety and battery notes

• Use only clean, non-carbonated water inside the bottle.
  • Do not open or tamper with the electronic base.
  • Keep away from heat, direct sunlight, and moisture.
  • Charge only with a 5V 1A adapter. Do not use fast chargers.
  • Do not drop the bottle or shake it vigorously while operating.
  • The bottle contains a built-in rechargeable lithium-ion battery.
  • Charge fully before extended storage and ideally store between 10°C and 40°C (50°F to 104°F).
Troubleshooting

settings.heading: No bubbles appear

settings.text: This can happen if the membrane is dry or there is mineral buildup. Use filtered water and run a self-clean cycle. If needed, keep the base soaked in water for 1 to 2 hours to re-hydrate the membrane.

settings.heading: Bottle beeps repeatedly or stops mid-cycle

settings.text: The battery may be low or the membrane may need cleaning. Recharge fully and, if needed, run a self-clean cycle. You can keep the same water and rerun a fresh hydrogenation.

settings.heading: Sour taste

settings.text: This is usually activation or cleaning water that was not emptied completely. Empty the bottle, refill with fresh water, and rerun a cycle. Rinse 2 to 3 times if needed.

settings.heading: Straw feels tight

settings.text: The silicone fit is new. Push the straw until you hear a click. It will loosen slightly with normal use.

settings.heading: Weak hydrogen output

settings.text: Use clean, non-carbonated water and run a self-clean cycle. If the bottle has been unused for a while, soaking and self-cleaning helps restore performance.
Dr. Water HydroPitcher
Model: HP-68 · Capacity: 68 oz · Hydrogen Output: Up to 1500 ppb · Plug-in (US Type B)
What’s in the box

• 1 × HydroPitcher (jug with attached base, magnetic lid removable, with purification balls inside)
  • 1 × Power cord and adapter (US Type B)
  • 1 × User Manual
  • 1 × Citric Acid Cleanser Sachet
Before you start - a few questions you may have

settings.heading: Is HydroPitcher safe for daily use?

settings.text: Yes. It is made from premium borosilicate glass and food-grade stainless steel, designed for daily family use. Most families drink 2 to 3 glasses per person throughout the day, just like regular water.

settings.heading: How much hydrogen does the pitcher produce?

settings.text: The HydroPitcher generates up to 1500 ppb of dissolved hydrogen gas in about 10 to 15 minutes, depending on the mode selected.

settings.heading: Can I use hot or cold water?

settings.text: Yes, chilled or room-temperature water is fine. Avoid hot water above 40°C (104°F). The pitcher can gently warm water up to about 52°C (125°F), but it is not designed to boil water. Do not pour boiling water directly inside.

settings.heading: What is the best time to drink hydrogen water?

settings.text: Any time works: morning, post-workout, or spread through the day. Drink within 30 to 120 minutes after generation for best results.

settings.heading: Can I refrigerate my water after hydrogenation?

settings.text: You can refrigerate it, but hydrogen naturally fades over time. For best results, drink within 30 to 120 minutes. If you like cold water, hydrogenate first, then add ice. Cooling after generation helps keep the hydrogen intact.

section_DjQ4jT.name: Before you start - a few questions you may have

settings.text: First use - setup and activation
Before your first use, run this quick activation process to prep the internal hydrogen membrane.
Step 1 - Clean with citric acid
Fill the pitcher with water and dissolve the provided citric acid cleanser as directed. Let it sit for about 15 minutes to clean the internal surfaces.
Step 2 - Rinse and soak if needed
Pour the water out. If you see very few bubbles during early runs, let the pitcher membrane soak in clean water for up to 2 hours to fully hydrate.
Step 3 - Plug in the power
Place the pitcher on the power base and plug the power cord into a wall outlet (US Type B).
Step 4 - Run a Standard Hydrogen cycle
Fill the pitcher with clean water up to the MAX line and press the Standard Hydrogen button. You will see bubbles forming. That means hydrogen generation has started.
Step 5 - Wait for the cycle to finish
Wait until the indicator lights turn off and you hear a beep. This means the cycle is complete. Pour out the water.
Step 6 - Repeat 2 to 3 times
Repeat the fill, run, pour cycle 2 to 3 times to fully activate and clean the membrane. After that, you are ready for daily use.

section_GawDBk.name: You already made a better choice than 99% of people.

settings.text: Daily use - making hydrogen water

1. Empty any old water left in the jug.
  2. Fill the pitcher with fresh, clean drinking water up to the MAX line and close the lid.
  3. Choose a hydrogen mode:
  • Standard Hydrogen - about 10 minutes (around 600 seconds).
  • High Hydrogen - about 15 minutes (around 900 seconds) for a higher concentration.
  1. Press the button for your chosen mode. You will see bubbles while it runs.
  2. Wait for the light to turn off and the beep sound. That means the cycle is complete.
  3. Pour and drink within 30 to 120 minutes for best results.
Care and maintenance

• What kind of water should I use daily?
    Use clean, filtered, or bottled water. Do not put anything except water inside the pitcher.
  • How often should I clean my HydroPitcher?
    Run a self-clean or smart-clean cycle every 2 weeks, or any time you have not used it for a while, to keep the hydrogen cell fresh and prevent mineral buildup.
  • Deep clean: Once a month, fill the jug with a 1:3 mix of white vinegar or citric acid and water. Run one hydrogen cycle, pour it out, then rinse twice with clean water. This helps remove mineral deposits and keep hydrogen output strong.
  • Dishwasher safety: The lid is dishwasher safe. The jug with attached base should not go in the dishwasher or be submerged. Wipe the outside with a soft, damp cloth only.
  • Storage: If you will not be using it for 2 weeks or more, empty and dry it completely and store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Before using again, run one quick self-clean cycle.
Safety and general warnings

• Use only water inside the pitcher. Do not add juices, teas, or other liquids.
  • Do not use hot or boiling water. Avoid water above 40°C (104°F).
  • Do not submerge or shake the base while it is running.
  • Keep away from heat sources and open flames.
  • Use only the included power cord and a suitable wall outlet.
  • Keep out of reach of children and pets.
  • Do not open, tamper with, or disassemble the attached base.
Warranty and support

• 12-month standard warranty for manufacturing defects.
  • 60-day money-back guarantee if you bought from our store, 30 days if purchased from Amazon or Walmart.
  • 6 months free warranty extension when you register online within 30 days of purchase.
Troubleshooting

settings.heading: Less bubbles appear

settings.text: This is often due to mineral buildup or a dry membrane. Run the self-cleaning mode 1 to 2 times with a vinegar or citric solution to clear the electrodes, then rinse and try again.

settings.heading: Stops mid-cycle

settings.text: Power may have been interrupted or the cord may be loose. Check both ends of the power cord, reconnect, and rerun the cycle.

settings.heading: Sour or foul taste

settings.text: Residual cleaning water or vinegar may still be inside. Rinse 2 to 3 times with fresh water and run a normal water cycle before drinking.

settings.heading: Light will not turn on

settings.text: Ensure the power cord is firmly plugged into both the base and wall outlet. Try a different outlet if needed.

settings.heading: Weak hydrogen output

settings.text: The membrane may be dry or scaled. Run a deep clean with vinegar or citric acid and repeat 2 to 3 hydrogen cycles to reactivate performance.
How to make a warranty claim:

• Visit drwater.store/warranty.
  • Enter your Order ID, Name, and Email.
  • Fill out the claim form with the issue you are facing.
  • Our team usually responds within 1 to 2 business days.
Register your product:
Go to drwater.store/register or scan the QR code on your card within 30 days of purchase to activate your extended warranty.
